$comment: MailAegis update & announcement channel. Edit this file, commit it, push it — every running copy of MailAegis picks it up within a few hours. See channel/README.md for the field reference.

latest.notes: Multi-account mailboxes, delivery-path tracing and the desktop app.
changelog: Several mailboxes at once — connect security@, finance@ and info@ side by side, with a unified inbox.
Quick-connect presets for Microsoft 365, Google Workspace, Mailcow and friends.
Delivery-path tracing: every hop, originating IP, rDNS and dwell time.
Hybrid Analysis (Falcon Sandbox) as a sixth engine, hash-lookup only.
Signed desktop builds for macOS and Windows.

announcements.title: MailAegis is open source — and free forever.
announcements.body: If it saves your team from one wire-transfer fraud, a star on GitHub is all we ask.
